name: edudrive
description: EduDrive - Cloud storage platform for students

scripts.start: docker compose up -d && concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start:app: docker compose up -d && concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND,APP" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "node scripts/open-app.js"
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
